title: Integration II — Standard Functions, Substitution and by Parts
description: Integrate exponential, trigonometric and reciprocal functions, reverse the chain rule by substitution, apply integration by parts, and find the area between two curves.
objectives: Integrate e^x, 1/x, sin(x) and cos(x) using the standard results
Reverse the chain rule to integrate by substitution, including choosing a sensible substitution u
Apply integration by parts to integrate a product of functions
Find the area between two curves by integrating the difference of the two functions

lessons.title: Integration by parts and the area between two curves
